rationale: The benchmark ceiling (basic API fuzzing/DoS) demonstrates limited capability transfer to sophisticated execution evasion against EDR-protected enterprises. However, even basic LLM assistance with scripting syntax, simple obfuscation, and alternative LOLBin suggestions provides marginal value to already-capable OC3 actors. Expected uplift: ~10-18% relative increase from 50% baseline, justified by incremental efficiency gains rather than fundamental capability enhancement.
